hero.subheading: NutriVault is the precision nutrition tracker built for people who take their health seriously. Log meals, track macros, monitor weight, and reach your goals — all in one elegant dashboard.
hero.noCardRequired: No credit card required · Completely free

features.heading: Everything you need to succeed
features.subheading: Precision tools wrapped in a clean, distraction-free interface designed to keep you focused on what matters.
features.calorieDesc: Log every meal with precision. Track calories and stay within your daily target effortlessly.
features.macroDesc: Dial in your protein, carbs, and fat with clear visual progress bars and daily targets.
features.progressDesc: Visualize your weight loss journey and nutrition trends with beautiful, readable charts.
features.foodDiaryDesc: Breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks — organized by meal with instant totals.
features.goalDesc: Set your goal — lose, maintain, or build — and get personalized calorie and macro targets instantly.
features.weeklyDesc: Review your week at a glance with daily summaries and weekly averages.

howItWorks.heading: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subheading: No complicated setup. Just create an account and start tracking.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in under 30 seconds — no credit card required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Tell us about yourself. We calculate your personalized calorie and macro targets.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Search our food database, add meals, and track every bite.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Charts, streaks, and weekly summaries keep you motivated and on track.

free.heading: Free for Everyone, Forever
free.subheading: NutriVault is completely free. No subscription, no hidden fees, no locked features — everything is available to everyone.

cta.heading: Your best body starts today.
cta.subheading: Join thousands of people who have already transformed their nutrition habits with NutriVault.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your NutriVault account to continue.
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start your nutrition journey — it's completely free.
register.termsText: By creating an account, you agree to our

languageSelector.title: Choose your language
languageSelector.subtitle: Select your preferred language to continue

diary.title: Food Diary
diary.noFoodsFound: No foods found. Try a different search.
diary.createFoodSuccessDesc: Your food is now searchable in the diary

nlp.title: Describe your meal
nlp.placeholder: e.g. 2 eggs, toast with butter, and coffee with milk...
nlp.noResults: Could not parse any foods. Try being more specific.

diary.copyYesterdayHint: Copy all meals from the previous day

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, goals, and account preferences
settings.activityGoalDesc: Changing these will recalculate your calorie and macro targets
settings.dangerZoneDesc: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.
settings.freePlanDesc: All core nutrition tracking features — free forever
settings.premiumFuture: Future advanced features arriving in a later update
settings.invalidCodeDesc: This promo code is not valid. Please check and try again.
settings.premiumFree: Premium is FREE with your code!
settings.premiumFreeDesc: Your discount code will unlock premium access when it launches
settings.exportDataDesc: Download your meal diary and weight history as CSV files.

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your weight and calorie trends over time
progress.logAtLeast2Entries: Log at least 2 weight entries to see your trend.
progress.tip1: Weigh yourself at the same time each day
progress.tip2: Best measured in the morning after waking
progress.tip3: Weekly averages are more reliable than daily

chat.title: Nutrition Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask me about nutrition, meals, and health goals
chat.placeholder: Ask about nutrition, meals, or get tips...
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm your nutrition assistant. I can help you analyze meals, estimate calories and macros, and give nutrition advice. What would you like to know?
examplePrompts: How many calories in a bowl of oatmeal?
How can I increase my protein intake?
What should I eat after training?

onboarding.subtitle: Let's personalize your experience.
onboarding.bodyStatsDesc: Used to calculate your accurate Basal Metabolic Rate.
onboarding.goalDesc: We'll adjust your calorie and macro targets accordingly.
onboarding.planReadyDesc: Based on your profile, here are your personalized daily targets.
onboarding.calculationExplanation: We used the Mifflin-St Jeor formula to estimate your Basal Metabolic Rate, then applied your activity multiplier and goal adjustment.

goalTypes.LOSE_WEIGHT_desc: Burn fat and reduce body weight

mealAnalysis.title: AI Meal Analysis
mealAnalysis.failed: Analysis failed. Please try again or add foods manually.

premium.upgradePrompt: This feature requires a premium account.
premium.activatedDesc: You now have access to all premium features.
premium.photoAnalysisDesc: Upload a photo of your meal and let AI estimate the nutrition.
